So let's think about it classic business niche improvement story That ties to what everybody says they want Okay, so if you ask most business owners most practice owners what they want One of the things they're quickly good to say to you is they want more customers They want more customers. They want more patients or they want more leads. Okay, that they'll that that's what they'll tell you However, now, of course, we know that's not what they need but that's not my point My point is is even in saying it you can't assume they are in agreement about the beneficial nature of having it even though they said they wanted it because What's in their head about what comes with more customers or more patients or more leads? Yeah, more work More work more overhead more staff more headaches more pains in the asses More taxes more maybe lower quality of customer or patient. So there are bigger nuisance than the ones I got now Right, there's all sorts of bad shit that comes with more customers more patients or more leads So even though they say they want it Because a it's the only thing they know to enunciate that might get them to what they really want right or B they think it's what you want to hear It's reflexive. It's what they hear everybody else say It's really it's feeding back what everybody's trying to sell them Because we know that's what they all want so we all talk about it so they feed back what we talk about But it does not mean they're in complete Embrace of the beneficial nature of the thing they just enunciated that they want to buy from us and we dare not assume That they have agreed to the beneficial nature of what they have just enunciated that they just want Right Especially beneficial nature sufficient to then motivate purchase and follow through All right So you know John and I had it because I was joking about buying the kettlebell and not being able to get it out of box By the way, if I did buy it, I wouldn't be able to get it out of the box, but I haven't bought one Okay, I got a guy though who would come over and get it out of the box for me But that seems to defeat the whole you know the whole purpose Unless I guess I can have him come over and exercise every day for me to but that seems to defeat the whole purpose So unless you think watching him exercise would be a very Dynamic benefit But so you know we had a little conversation and I acknowledge by the way That there is beneficial nature and even which we're going to get to personal beneficial nature to me get one of the damn things and exercise it with it Every day I am not yet willing to acknowledge sufficient beneficial nature In order to torture myself in this manner despite his generous invitation to send me a trainer Which by the way See you thought that might help the cause see that that doesn't help the cause They it is even less appealing to me to have the thing and a guy making me use it in my in In my house, then it was just having the thing say so you didn't really help I understand you think you're so So see people can hold conflicting thoughts and emotions
